description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer at the tail, with visible underwing pylons carrying missiles or external fuel tanks. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The jet is painted in a dark gray camouflage scheme with insignia and markings on the tail and fuselage. The nose is sharply pointed, and the air intake is located beneath the cockpit, characteristic of high-speed supersonic aircraft.
description: A dark gray, modern military fighter jet with swept-back wings, a single vertical stabilizer, and a forward-enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the jet, swept-back wings, underwing pylons, and tail markings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side's markings and external stores.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the jet exhaust, tail assembly, and the full span of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept-back wings with underwing pylons and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine with intake beneath the cockpit and exhaust at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
